question: Are all red vehicles in the parking lot replaced with yellow taxi cabs?
Do the replacement vehicles clearly feature NYC-style taxi attributes (yellow color, taxi signage)?
Are all replacement vehicles sedan body types (lower profile than the original SUVs)?
Do the replacement taxis maintain the exact parking positions of the original red vehicles?
Do the replacement taxis maintain the exact orientation and facing direction of the original vehicles?
Is the perspective and foreshortening of each replacement taxi consistent with its position in the image?
Are the wheels of the new taxis correctly grounded on the pavement without floating or sinking artifacts?
Are all non-red vehicles (white, black, silver, etc.) completely preserved without changes?
Are the parking lot details (yellow lines, pavement texture, cracks) preserved intact?
Is the edited image free from ghosting or remnants of the original red vehicles?
Are the replacement vehicles free from unnatural distortions, warping, or malformed structures?
Is the overall image clarity and resolution maintained?
